excluded_pools.detail: LINK/WETH 3000 exact replay remains blocked when callers force the legacy exclusions file on ad hoc temp inputs. Default replay now bypasses this override for the committed real fixture directories under study_artifacts/replay_diagnostics, where both the normal and stress 500-block windows replay clean with replay_error_p99 = 0.0.

UNI/WETH 3000 exact replay remains blocked when callers force the legacy exclusions file on ad hoc temp inputs. Default replay now bypasses this override for the committed real fixture directories under study_artifacts/replay_diagnostics, where both the normal and stress 500-block windows replay clean with replay_error_p99 = 0.0.
